---
description: "Design vocabulary for intra-slide visual design — read during art direction phase"
---

# Design Vocabulary

Specialist terms that trigger deep design knowledge.
Each term compresses what would otherwise take 10–20 tokens of description into a single word.

## Layout

### Structure
Comparison: side-by-side, column-cards, versus, before-after, Harvey-ball scorecard, spectrum, rating, table
Hierarchy: pyramid, tree, org-chart, nested, sunburst, layered, tiered
Sequence: process-flow, step-by-step, numbered-sequence, how-to, checklist, funnel
Cycle: loop, feedback-loop, circular-flow, iterative
Relationship: hub-and-spoke, radial, network, Venn, mind-map, concentric, constellation
Decomposition: anatomical, exploded-view, part-to-whole, waterfall, breakdown
Aggregation: dashboard, KPI-tiles, scorecard, summary-panel
Classification: matrix, 2x2, quadrant, grid-plot, categorization, spectrum-map
Temporal: timeline, Gantt, roadmap, milestone, progression, calendar-heatmap

### Emphasis
Narrative: hero-title, big-number, single-stat, quote-with-attribution, pull-quote, key-takeaway, section-divider, full-bleed-image
Metric: KPI-tile, metric-pair, sparkline, delta-indicator, trend-arrow, percentage-ring, gauge, target-progress, traffic-light
Attention: spotlight, progressive-highlight, dim-and-highlight, color-pop, isolation, before-after-reveal, annotation, reference-line
Surface: gradient-overlay, color-block, text-overlay, card-elevation, frosted-glass, image-mask

### Data Relationship
Deviation: diverging-bar, spine, surplus-deficit
Correlation: scatterplot, bubble, connected-scatter, XY-heatmap
Ranking: ordered-bar, slope, lollipop, bump, dot-strip
Distribution: histogram, box-plot, violin, population-pyramid, barcode-plot
Change over time: line, area, candlestick, fan-chart, streamgraph, seismogram
Magnitude: paired-column, Marimekko, isotype, radar, parallel-coordinates, bullet
Part-to-whole: pie, donut, treemap, Voronoi, arc, stacked-column, waterfall
Spatial: choropleth, flow-map, contour, cartogram, dot-density, heatmap
Flow: Sankey, chord, network, alluvial

### Composition
Split: 50/50, 70/30, 30/70, image-left, image-right
Grid: bento-grid, modular-grid, masonry, 2x2, 3x2, grid-4
Full-surface: full-bleed, edge-to-edge, centered, single-focus
Reading-flow: z-pattern, f-pattern
Balance: asymmetric, rule-of-thirds, golden-ratio
Layering: overlapping, stacked-rows, title-content, whitespace-dominant

## Visual Treatment

### Surface & Texture
glassmorphism, neumorphism, claymorphism, neubrutalism
material-elevation, noise-grain, paper-texture, halftone, duotone
watercolor-wash, chalkboard, sketch-style, hand-drawn

### Image Processing
double-exposure, gradient-map, image-mask, clipping-mask, cutout, silhouette
posterize, threshold, solarize, long-shadow

### Dimensional
isometric, low-poly, cel-shading, parallax-depth
perspective-mockup, device-frame, floating-element, stacked-layers

## Typography

### Pairing & Contrast
font-pairing, serif-sans contrast, weight-contrast
size-ratio, condensed-vs-extended contrast

### Text Treatment
pull-quote, knockout-text, outlined-text
gradient-text, all-caps-spaced, small-caps accent

## Color Palette Direction

### Named Palettes
jewel-tones, earth-tones, nordic, cyberpunk, sunset, ocean
midnight, dusty-rose, forest, desert

### Palette Technique
duotone-palette, tint-and-shade, tone-on-tone
color-blocking, gradient-mesh

## Style Direction

### Era & Movement
Art Deco, Art Nouveau, Bauhaus, Swiss/International, Memphis, Mid-Century Modern
Pop Art, Vaporwave

### Mood
cottagecore, maximalist, brutalist, editorial, kinetic, monastic
retro-futurism, industrial
